objective: Persist honest user-local project source priority without adding normal-work ceremony or conflating route origin, hosting, trust, and proof
prefetch: Read current user catalog, trust, preference, project identity, route redaction, and selector precedence tests
Confirm normal show/discover/select do not mutate user or project state
constraints: Current master chooses host-native models automatically
No normal-work priority prompt or repository write
Personal project priority remains user-local and never grants trust
Route origin and hosting are independent from trust boundary
Adapter qualification is not exact dispatch proof
out_of_scope: Generic MCP or direct chat-completions dispatch
acceptance_criteria: User-local canonical-project priority supports automatic, self-hosted-first, and native-first
Normal work silently defaults to automatic without creating state
Selector preferences reorder only eligible routes using explicit origin and hosting metadata
Dispatch-qualified and dispatch-proven evidence remain distinct
Functional CLI and package tests pass
model_tier_reason: Crosses persistent user-local security state, route evidence semantics, selector precedence, and CLI compatibility
escalation_triggers: Preference storage would grant or migrate trust
Canonical identity behavior conflicts with existing approval fixtures
A schema migration would discard existing user state
Preference changes eligibility instead of stable ordering
